scene.message: {nl}
Mark: An angel in black...{waitkey}{ret}
Queen: Got hurt{wait_fr:37}... Yosuke did?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Huh?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: What did you{nl} just say?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: That's a lie...{wait_fr:32}{nl} Chisato, what a cruel joke...{waitkey}{ret}
Queen: ...{wait_fr:21}Wh...{wait_fr:21}{nl} what did you say...?{waitkey}{ret}
Queen: ...{wait_fr:32}A naked emperor,{nl} you say? Me?{waitkey}{ret}
